name: Signal
description: Both Sides race to activate and hold markers that call in powerful outside support. The first to achieve sustained signal dominance wins.

scoringRules.description: +1 VP per Controlled Signal Zone at End of Turn
+1 VP for Courier reaching Opposing edge, +1 VP per Turn while remaining

specialRules.name: Dominance
specialRules.description: Signal Zone is Controlled when at least 1 Friendly model is within zone and no Opposing models are within

specialRules.name: Courier
specialRules.description: Each Side designates one Courier. Reaching Opposing edge awards +1 VP immediately

specialRules.name: Sanctuary
specialRules.description: +1 VP for maintaining at least 25% of starting BP within deployment edge
